tasks.subject: Extend near() with optional epsilon
tasks.description: main.js:10 -> function near(a, b, e) { return Math.abs(a - b) < (e || 2); }. Backward compatible; foundation for FR-001 (epsilon-6 stale check) and FR-003 (threshold guard).
tasks.evidence: near(a,b,e) with (e||2) at main.js:10; all existing call sites unchanged

tasks.subject: Loosen stale-gap detection to epsilon 6
tasks.description: In saveGeo stale-gap detection (main.js:90) call near(mL, gaps.l, 6) / near(mR, gaps.r, 6) / near(mT, gaps.t, 6) / near(mB, gaps.b, 6) so CSD windows settled a few px off are recognized as gap-shaped and skipped. FR-001.
tasks.evidence: saveGeo stale-gap check uses near(m*, gaps.*, 6) on all four margins

tasks.subject: US1 test: reload-safe restore
tasks.description: Gap Mailspring, ./reload.sh, maximize twice: returns true pre-maximize size +/-2px, 5 cycles, 100% (SC-001). Evidence: user confirmation.
tasks.evidence: User-confirmed: post-reload toggle restores true original size (US1 gate passed)

tasks.subject: Connect windowRemoved cleanup
tasks.description: After main.js:131 add workspace.windowRemoved.connect(function (win) { var wid = String(win.internalId); delete winState[wid]; delete busy[wid]; }); + AIDEV-NOTE. Validate symbol fires with a temporary print(), strip before commit (P5). FR-002.
tasks.evidence: workspace.windowRemoved connected, deletes winState+busy; validated live with temp print (20/20 removals fired), print stripped

tasks.subject: US2 test: state cleanup on close
tasks.description: Temporary instrumented count of winState keys; open+close 20 windows: 0 lingering entries within 5s (SC-002). Strip instrumentation after. Evidence: journal count output.
tasks.evidence: Scripted test: 20 kdialog windows opened+killed, journal shows 20 'removed' lines, remaining count decremented 1 per close (SC-002)

tasks.subject: Add threshold tolerance to dock-edge nudge
tasks.description: In compensateDockEdge (main.js:109-116) change each of the four 'dist < threshold' conditions to 'dist < threshold && !near(dist, threshold)' so windows at the threshold (+/-2px) are never re-nudged. FR-003.
tasks.evidence: Four nudge conditions now 'dist < threshold && !near(dist, threshold)' in compensateDockEdge; node --check OK, 149 non-blank lines

tasks.subject: US3 test: no jitter at threshold
tasks.description: Mode 2; window at exact threshold distance from panel edge: 0 geometry writes in 60s with >=10 geometry events (SC-003). Evidence: user observation / journal.
tasks.evidence: User-confirmed: single nudge to threshold, zero spontaneous moves in 60s (US3 gate passed)

tasks.subject: Syntax check main.js
tasks.description: node --check exits 0; no print() left (P5); <=150 non-blank lines (P10). Evidence: output.
tasks.evidence: node --check OK; print-count 0; 149 non-blank lines (<=150 P10)

tasks.subject: Manual golden path test
tasks.description: Spec §9 golden path: gap Mailspring, reload, maximize twice -> true original size +/-2px (5 cycles).
tasks.evidence: User-confirmed: golden path re-passed after all changes (reload + toggle restores true size)

tasks.subject: Manual edge-case tests
tasks.description: Spec §9 edge cases: 20 open/close -> 0 entries; threshold window 0 nudges in 60s; fractional scaling 125%/150% on boundary test.
tasks.evidence: 20 open/close scripted -> 20/20 cleaned (journal); threshold window static 60s; user-confirmed

tasks.subject: Regression: spec-02 set + CLAUDE.md checklist
tasks.description: Spec-02 §9 regression set re-passes (CSD gap/restore, layout re-fit, drag-away reset) + full CLAUDE.md checklist (SC-004). FR-004.
tasks.evidence: User-confirmed: spec-02 regression set + CLAUDE.md checklist re-passed (SC-004)

tasks.subject: Verify journalctl free of error spam
tasks.description: journalctl shows no maxpadd errors during the whole test session (T009-T011).
tasks.evidence: journalctl: 0 errors, 0 residual diag prints in test window
